revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:8 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[hak:8-ngie̍t 15-ngit (nùng-la̍k)]][[ja:8月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 8월 15일]][[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:八月十五]][[zh:八月十五]]
{{Not to be confused with|August 15|qq=August 15}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=八月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 8월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar August|qq=}} '''August 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|August (Lunisolar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|lt=August (Hazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 8th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10886789}} . == Events == * {{ill|Anna (era)|en|Anna (era)|qid=Q1373003|lt=Anna (Japan)|1=Anna (era)}} 1 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|968|en|968|qid=Q23918|lt=968|1=968}} {{ill|September 10|en|September 10|qid=Q2853|lt=September 10|1=September 10}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Kōhō|en|Kōhō|qid=Q1327182|lt=Kōhō (Japan)|1=Kōhō}} to Anna. * {{ill|Engen (Japan)|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|qid=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|qid=Q1194159|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engen (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1194159}} 1 / {{ill|Jianwu|en|Jianwu|qid=Q11065423|lt=Kenmu (Japan)|1=Jianwu}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1336|en|1336|qid=Q6028|lt=1336|1=1336}} {{ill|September 20|en|September 20|qid=Q2892|lt=September 20|1=September 20}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōmyō|en|Emperor Kōmyō|qid=Q555520|lt=Emperor Kōmyō|1=Emperor Kōmyō}} of the {{ill|Northern Court|en|Northern Court|qid=Q1201819|lt=Northern Court (Japan)|1=Northern Court}} ascends to the throne, reestablishing the {{ill|Nanboku-chō period|en|Nanboku-chō period|qid=Q264012|lt=Nanboku-chō period|1=Nanboku-chō period}} . * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|qid=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 10 (Julian {{ill|1567|en|1567|qid=Q6642|lt=1567|1=1567}} {{ill|September 17|en|September 17|qid=Q2894|lt=September 17|1=September 17}} ) – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|qid=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}} captures {{ill|Inabayama Castle|ja|稲葉山城|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inabayama Castle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 岐阜城|1=Gifu Castle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1367052}} , renaming it {{ill|Gifu Castle|en|Gifu Castle|qid=Q1367052|lt=Gifu Castle|1=Gifu Castle}} . This marks the first appearance of the name "Gifu." * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1723|en|1723|qid=Q6921|lt=1723|1=1723}} {{ill|September 14|en|September 14|qid=Q2847|lt=September 14|1=September 14}} ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} issues an order to install {{ill|Fire lookout tower|en|Fire lookout tower|qid=Q748998|lt=fire watchtowers|1=Fire lookout tower}} throughout Edo. * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|qid=Q1373146|lt=Bunka (era)|1=Bunka}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1808|en|1808|qid=Q6914|lt=1808|1=1808}} {{ill|October 4|en|October 4|qid=Q2929|lt=October 4|1=October 4}} ) – {{ill|Phaeton Incident|ja|フェートン号事件|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Phaeton Incident|1=Nagasaki Harbour Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17230023}} . * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1869|en|1869|qid=Q7720|lt=1869|1=1869}} {{ill|September 20|en|September 20|qid=Q2892|lt=September 20|1=September 20}} ) – The {{ill|Meiji government|ja|明治政府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji government|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 明治維新|1=Meiji Restoration|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q8707}} issues a decree renaming {{ill|Ezo|1=Emishi|2=ja|3=蝦夷|ja|Ezo|1=Ezo|2=ja|3=蝦夷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ezo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q932574}} to {{ill|Hokkaido|en|Hokkaido|qid=Q35581|lt=Hokkaidō|1=Hokkaido}} . == Births == * {{ill|Hōki|en|Hōki|qid=Q18520676|lt=Hōki (era)|1=Hōki}} 5 (Julian {{ill|774|en|774|qid=Q30528|lt=774|1=774}} {{ill|September 25|en|September 25|qid=Q2886|lt=September 25|1=September 25}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Heizei|en|Emperor Heizei|qid=Q353558|lt=Emperor Heizei|1=Emperor Heizei}} , the 51st {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}} (+ {{ill|824|en|824|qid=Q30353|lt=824|1=824}} ). * {{ill|Hyeonjong of Joseon|en|Hyeonjong of Joseon|qid=Q484253|lt=Hyeonjong of Joseon|1=Hyeonjong of Joseon}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1661|en|1661|qid=Q7005|lt=1661|1=1661}} {{ill|October 7|en|October 7|qid=Q2926|lt=October 7|1=October 7}} ) – {{ill|Sukjong of Joseon|en|Sukjong of Joseon|qid=Q485664|lt=Sukjong of Joseon|1=Sukjong of Joseon}} , King of {{ill|Joseon|en|Joseon|qid=Q28179|lt=Joseon|1=Joseon}} (+ {{ill|1720|en|1720|qid=Q6908|lt=1720|1=1720}} ). * {{ill|Hōreki|en|Hōreki|qid=Q1194397|lt=Hōreki|1=Hōreki}} 11 (Gregorian {{ill|1761|en|1761|qid=Q7649|lt=1761|1=1761}} {{ill|September 13|en|September 13|qid=Q2848|lt=September 13|1=September 13}} ) – {{ill|Santō Kyōden|en|Santō Kyōden|qid=Q938347|lt=Santo Kyoden|1=Santō Kyōden}} , {{ill|gesaku writer|ja|戯作家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/gesaku writer|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135491428|1=gesakusha}} (+ {{ill|1816|en|1816|qid=Q6953|lt=1816|1=1816}} ). * {{ill|Meiwa (Japan)|ja|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiwa (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1146161}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1771|en|1771|qid=Q7686|lt=1771|1=1771}} {{ill|September 23|en|September 23|qid=Q2888|lt=September 23|1=September 23}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōkaku|en|Emperor Kōkaku|qid=Q313806|lt=Emperor Kōkaku|1=Emperor Kōkaku}} , the 119th emperor (+ {{ill|1840|en|1840|qid=Q7619|lt=1840|1=1840}} ). * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 10 (Gregorian {{ill|1798|en|1798|qid=Q7823|lt=1798|1=1798}} {{ill|September 24|en|September 24|qid=Q2890|lt=September 24|1=September 24}} ) – {{ill|Takashima Shūhan|en|Takashima Shūhan|qid=Q7677398|lt=Takashima Shūhan|1=Takashima Shūhan}} , {{ill|artillery expert|ja|砲術家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/artillery expert|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 砲術|1=Hōjutsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1052668}} (+ {{ill|1866|en|1866|qid=Q7712|lt=1866|1=1866}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 13 (Gregorian {{ill|1842|en|1842|qid=Q7625|lt=1842|1=1842}} {{ill|September 19|en|September 19|qid=Q2896|lt=September 19|1=September 19}} ) – {{ill|Gagūn Tatsuchi|ja|臥雲辰致|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gagūn Tatsuchi|1=Tatchi Gaun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11612437}} , {{ill|inventor|ja|発明家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/inventor|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Inventor|qid=Q205375}} (+ {{ill|1900|en|1900|qid=Q2034|lt=1900|1=1900}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1854|en|1854|qid=Q7670|lt=1854|1=1854}} {{ill|October 6|en|October 6|qid=Q2928|lt=October 6|1=October 6}} ) – {{ill|Takamine Hideo|en|Takamine Hideo|qid=Q3461611|lt=Takane Hidehisa|1=Takamine Hideo}} , {{ill|educator|ja|教育関係人物一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/educator|1=list of people in education|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q4391591}} (+ {{ill|1910|en|1910|qid=Q2075|lt=1910|1=1910}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1855|en|1855|qid=Q7673|lt=1855|1=1855}} {{ill|September 25|en|September 25|qid=Q2886|lt=September 25|1=September 25}} ) – [[:en:Aeba Koson|Aiba Kōson]] , {{ill|novelist|ja|Novelist|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/novelist|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|theater critic|ja|演劇Critic|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/theater critic|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+ {{ill|1922|en|1922|qid=Q2165|lt=1922|1=1922}} ). * {{ill|Man'en|en|Man'en|qid=Q1193862|lt=Man'en|1=Man'en}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1860|en|1860|qid=Q7691|lt=1860|1=1860}} {{ill|September 29|en|September 29|qid=Q2882|lt=September 29|1=September 29}} ) – {{ill|Ogawa Kazumasa|en|Ogawa Kazumasa|qid=Q3133048|lt=Ogawa Kazumasa|1=Ogawa Kazumasa}} , {{ill|Photographer|en|Photographer|qid=Q33231|lt=photographer|1=Photographer}} (+ {{ill|1929|en|1929|qid=Q18792|lt=1929|1=1929}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Yōmei|ja|Emperor Yōmei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōmei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1 (Julian {{ill|585|en|585|qid=Q32201|lt=585|1=585}} {{ill|September 13|en|September 13|qid=Q2848|lt=September 13|1=September 13}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Bidatsu|en|Emperor Bidatsu|qid=Q316637|lt=Emperor Bidatsu|1=Emperor Bidatsu}} , the 30th emperor (* {{ill|538|en|538|qid=Q32894|lt=538|1=538}} ?). * {{ill|Tenryaku|en|Tenryaku|qid=Q1346281|lt=Tenryaku|1=Tenryaku}} 6 (Julian {{ill|952|en|952|qid=Q30175|lt=952|1=952}} {{ill|September 6|en|September 6|qid=Q2858|lt=September 6|1=September 6}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Suzaku|en|Emperor Suzaku|qid=Q361019|lt=Emperor Suzaku|1=Emperor Suzaku}} , the 61st emperor (* {{ill|923|en|923|qid=Q30108|lt=923|1=923}} ). * {{ill|Shōchū (era)|ja|Shōchū (元号)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōchū (era)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2 (Julian {{ill|1325|en|1325|qid=Q5774|lt=1325|1=1325}} {{ill|September 22|en|September 22|qid=Q2889|lt=September 22|1=September 22}} ) – {{ill|Keizan|en|Keizan|qid=Q1615313|lt=Keizan Jōkin|1=Keizan}} , the fourth patriarch of {{ill|Sōtō Zen|ja|Sōtō Zen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōtō Zen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (* {{ill|1268|en|1268|qid=Q5520|lt=1268|1=1268}} ). == Commemorations == * {{ill|Tsukimi|en|Tsukimi|qid=Q1050292|lt=Tsukimi|1=Tsukimi}} (Jūgoya, {{ill|Mid-Autumn Festival|en|Mid-Autumn Festival|qid=Q379519|lt=Mid-Autumn Festival|1=Mid-Autumn Festival}} in China, {{ill|Chuseok|en|Chuseok|qid=Q1090024|lt=Chuseok|1=Chuseok}} in Korea). ** {{ill|Uneme Festival|ja|采女祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uneme Festival|1=Uneme Matsuri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11644507}} ({{ill|Saruzawa Pond|ja|猿沢池|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saruzawa Pond|1=Sarusawa Pond|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11572131}} , {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|qid=Q169134|lt=Nara|1=Nara (city)}} ). ** {{ill|Shichi Festival|ja|節祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shichi Festival|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Yaeyama Islands|ja|八重山地方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yaeyama Islands|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八重山列島|1=Yaeyama Islands|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q696496}} , {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|en|Okinawa Prefecture|qid=Q766445|lt=Okinawa|1=Okinawa Prefecture}} ). ** {{ill|Ōtsuna Hiki|ja|大綱引|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuna Hiki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Itoman, Okinawa|en|Itoman, Okinawa|qid=Q860662|lt=Itoman|1=Itoman, Okinawa}} , Okinawa). ** {{ill|Kaiichi Odori|ja|皆一踊り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaiichi Odori|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Chibu, Shimane|en|Chibu, Shimane|qid=Q1204968|lt=Chibu Village|1=Chibu, Shimane}} , {{ill|Oki District, Shimane|en|Oki District, Shimane|qid=Q735735|lt=Oki District|1=Oki District, Shimane}} , {{ill|Shimane Prefecture|en|Shimane Prefecture|qid=Q132751|lt=Shimane Prefecture|1=Shimane Prefecture}} ).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|8|14|8|16|7|15|9|8|0815|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
